title: Red Enchantment Glint
description: Changes the enchantment glint color from purple to red.
body: Simple texture pack that changes the enchantment glint color from the <font color=#D651E2>**normal color**</font> to <font color=#FF0000>**red**</font> including all items such as enchanted books, enchanted golden apples, armors, tools and any enchantable item you can think of.
